query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A horizontal scene of white birds in flight against a deep blue sky, with pale blue and white tones suggesting sky reflected on water below, captured with visible motion creating soft, elongated forms.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred photograph of white birds in flight against a deep blue sky, with soft elongated forms dissolving into streaks of pale blue and white, creating an abstract dreamlike impression where subjects and their reflections become indistinct gestures of color and light.
